case_title: ALERT PEST CONTROL COMPANY, INC. VS FLYING SAUCER, LLC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $333.90 FILED BY ALERT PEST CONTROL COMPANY, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FLYING SAUCER, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-09-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
